scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.db:fresh: npm run db:reset && npm run db:migrate
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run db:migrate && npm run build
scripts.update: git pull origin main && npm run setup
scripts.dev: npm run db:migrate && concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:backend: npm run db:migrate && cd backend && npm run dev
scripts.start: npm run db:migrate && cd backend && npm run start
